texto: 'Are our gods better than Olaf's god?' Alfdis laughed. 'That's a silly question. Gods are gods. Our gods have been with us since the beginning of the world. We sacrifice to them, and they aid us when they see fit. Other people have their own gods and their own ways of dealing with them. That's their concern.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de James Erich que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “'Are our gods better than Olaf's god?' Alfdis laughed. 'That's a silly question. Gods are gods. O…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, gods, historical-fiction, com foco em historical-fiction e religion.
